---
title: "About"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
        <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Serif+Display:ital@0;1&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
---

```{=html}
<style>
  :root {
    --ink:        #1a1a2e;
    --ink-muted:  #4a4a6a;
    --ink-light:  #8888aa;
    --surface:    #f8f7f4;
    --surface-2:  #f0ede8;
    --accent:     #2563eb;
    --accent-warm:#e05c1a;
    --border:     rgba(26,26,46,0.10);
    --serif:      'DM Serif Display', Georgia, serif;
    --sans:       'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif;
  }

  body { font-family: var(--sans); color: var(--ink); background: var(--surface); }
  #quarto-content { padding: 0 !important; }
  .page-columns { display: block !important; }
  h1.title, .quarto-title { display: none !important; }

  .sdb-about {
    max-width: 860px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 3.5rem 1.5rem 5rem;
  }

  /* ── Shared section labels ── */
  .section-label {
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.13em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--ink-light);
    margin: 0 0 0.6rem;
  }
  .section-title {
    font-family: var(--serif);
    font-size: 1.85rem;
    color: var(--ink);
    margin: 0 0 1.4rem;
    line-height: 1.2;
  }

  /* ── Philosophy Statement ── */
  .philosophy-statement {
    margin-bottom: 4rem;
  }
  .phil-quote {
    font-family: var(--serif);
    font-size: 1.35rem;
    font-style: italic;
    color: var(--ink);
    line-height: 1.6;
    border-left: 3px solid var(--accent);
    padding: 0.8rem 0 0.8rem 1.5rem;
    margin: 0;
  }

  /* ── Career Journey ── */
  .journey { margin-bottom: 4rem; }
  .bench-to-bytes { margin-bottom: 2rem; }
  .bench-to-bytes p {
    font-size: 1rem;
    line-height: 1.8;
    color: var(--ink-muted);
    margin: 0 0 1rem;
  }
  .bench-to-bytes p:last-child { margin: 0; }
  .timeline {
    position: relative;
    padding-left: 2.4rem;
  }
  .timeline::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    left: 0.65rem;
    top: 0.5rem;
    bottom: 0.5rem;
    width: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(to bottom, var(--accent), var(--accent-warm));
    border-radius: 2px;
  }
  .tl-item {
    position: relative;
    margin-bottom: 2.4rem;
  }
  .tl-item:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }
  .tl-dot {
    position: absolute;
    left: -2.4rem;
    top: 0.32rem;
    width: 14px; height: 14px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: white;
    border: 2.5px solid var(--accent);
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px var(--surface);
  }
  .tl-item.active .tl-dot {
    background: var(--accent);
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(37,99,235,0.18);
  }
  .tl-period {
    font-size: 0.76rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.07em;
    color: var(--accent);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-bottom: 0.2rem;
  }
  .tl-role {
    font-family: var(--serif);
    font-size: 1.12rem;
    color: var(--ink);
    margin: 0 0 0.2rem;
  }
  .tl-place {
    font-size: 0.82rem;
    font-weight: 500;
    color: var(--ink-light);
    margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
  }
  .tl-desc {
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    color: var(--ink-muted);
    line-height: 1.65;
    margin: 0;
  }

  /* ── Deep Expertise ── */
  .expertise { margin-bottom: 4rem; }
  .expertise-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 1.2rem;
  }
  @media (max-width: 560px) { .expertise-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }
  .exp-card {
    background: white;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 14px;
    padding: 1.3rem 1.5rem;
    transition: box-shadow 0.18s;
  }
  .exp-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(26,26,46,0.07); }
  .exp-card-title {
    font-size: 0.76rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.1em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--accent);
    margin: 0 0 0.9rem;
  }
  .exp-list {
    list-style: none;
    margin: 0; padding: 0;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 0.45rem;
  }
  .exp-list li {
    font-size: 0.88rem;
    color: var(--ink-muted);
    padding-left: 1rem;
    position: relative;
    line-height: 1.5;
  }
  .exp-list li::before {
    content: '→';
    position: absolute;
    left: 0;
    color: var(--accent-warm);
    font-size: 0.78rem;
  }

  /* ── Resources ── */
  .resources { margin-bottom: 1rem; }
  .resources-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
    gap: 1rem;
  }
  @media (max-width: 700px) {
    .resources-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
  }
  .res-card {
    background: white;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 14px;
    padding: 1.3rem 1.4rem;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 0.4rem;
    text-decoration: none;
    color: inherit;
    transition: all 0.18s;
  }
  .res-card:hover {
    box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(26,26,46,0.08);
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    border-color: rgba(37,99,235,0.25);
  }
  .res-icon { font-size: 1.4rem; }
  .res-title {
    font-family: var(--serif);
    font-size: 1rem;
    color: var(--ink);
    margin-top: 0.2rem;
  }
  .res-sub {
    font-size: 0.81rem;
    color: var(--ink-light);
    line-height: 1.5;
    flex-grow: 1;
  }
  .res-cta {
    font-size: 0.79rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--accent);
    margin-top: 0.4rem;
  }
</style>

<div class="sdb-about">

  <!-- ── PHILOSOPHY STATEMENT ── -->
  <div class="philosophy-statement">
    <blockquote class="phil-quote">
      "From identifying proteomics biomarkers for disease to leading multi-omics biomarker platforms — the question hasn't changed, only the scale has."
    </blockquote>
  </div>

  <!-- ── CAREER JOURNEY ── -->
  <div class="journey">
    <p class="section-label">Career Journey</p>
    <h2 class="section-title">From Bench to Bytes</h2>
    <div class="bench-to-bytes">
      <p>My scientific journey began in proteomics, when I gained my first level of research experience with my master thesis in the area of proteomics and mass spectrometry. This led me to pursue PhD-level research in mass spectrometry-based proteomics — working at the intersection of analytical chemistry and computational biology to identify biomarkers, decode protein function and protein-protein interaction networks.</p>
      <p>Over the years I worked across the full breadth of proteomics — from disease biomarker discovery in serum and plasma, to cellular proteomics, protein-protein interaction studies and PTM-specific platforms spanning phosphorylation, glycosylation and cysteine modifications. I also designed and taught practical proteomics data analysis courses, translating complex computational workflows into accessible training for the next generation of researchers.</p>
      <p>Today, I channel that foundation into AI-driven drug discovery — leading the development of biomarker modules for omics research, building data pipelines and integrating large language models to transform raw biological data into actionable insights for pharmaceutical innovation.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ── DEEP EXPERTISE ── -->
  <div class="expertise">
    <p class="section-label">Deep Expertise</p>
    <h2 class="section-title">What I Actually Know</h2>
    <div class="expertise-grid">
      <div class="exp-card">
        <div class="exp-card-title">🔬 Mass Spectrometry & Proteomics</div>
        <ul class="exp-list">
          <li>LC-MS/MS experimental design & data acquisition</li>
          <li>Database searching (MaxQuant, Mascot, Proteome Discoverer)</li>
          <li>Label-free and TMTquantification</li>
          <li>Post-translational modification (PTM) analysis</li>
          <li>Protein complex & interaction network mapping</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <div class="exp-card">
        <div class="exp-card-title">🤖 AI, ML & LLMs</div>
        <ul class="exp-list">
          <li>LLM prompt engineering & pipeline integration</li>
          <li>ML model application for biological data</li>
          <li>AI-assisted biomarker candidate scoring</li>
          <li>Data curation and ETL for omics workflows</li>
          <li>Python & R for ML pipelines</li>
          <li>Evaluation frameworks for model outputs in science</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <div class="exp-card">
        <div class="exp-card-title">📊 Bioinformatics & Statistics</div>
        <ul class="exp-list">
          <li>Multi-omics data integration</li>
          <li>Statistical modelling for high-dimensional biological data</li>
          <li>Differential expression & enrichment analysis</li>
          <li>Data visualisation (ggplot2, ComplexHeatmap)</li>
          <li>Reproducible pipeline development in R & Python</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <div class="exp-card">
        <div class="exp-card-title">🚀 Product & Leadership</div>
        <ul class="exp-list">
          <li>Biomarker module architecture & product management</li>
          <li>Cross-functional team leadership (science × engineering)</li>
          <li>Scientific communication for non-technical stakeholders</li>
          <li>Agile delivery in research-product environments</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ── RESOURCES ── -->
  <div class="resources">
    <p class="section-label">Explore Further</p>
    <h2 class="section-title">Work & Resources</h2>
    <div class="resources-grid">
      <a class="res-card" href="../cv/Thesis.pdf" target="_blank">
        <div class="res-icon">📄</div>
        <div class="res-title">PhD Thesis</div>
        <div class="res-sub">The full scientific foundation — mass spectrometry-based proteomics research in depth.</div>
        <div class="res-cta">Read PDF →</div>
      </a>
      <a class="res-card" href="../cv/index.html">
        <div class="res-icon">🎓</div>
        <div class="res-title">Academic CV</div>
        <div class="res-sub">Publications, conference presentations, education, awards, and full research history.</div>
        <div class="res-cta">View CV →</div>
      </a>
      <a class="res-card" href="https://github.com/santoshdbhosale" target="_blank">
        <div class="res-icon">💻</div>
        <div class="res-title">R Scripts & Code</div>
        <div class="res-sub">Open-source pipelines for proteomics analysis, statistical modelling, and omics workflows.</div>
        <div class="res-cta">View on GitHub →</div>
      </a>
      <a class="res-card" href="../blog/index.html">
        <div class="res-icon">✍️</div>
        <div class="res-title">Blog</div>
        <div class="res-sub">Long-form writing on proteomics - snapshot of previous publications.</div>
        <div class="res-cta">Read Posts →</div>
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```
